# team/correspondence

Durable inter-agent correspondence and async notes. Use this for messages that should outlive a single IM thread — request/response notes, status updates, decisions reached over multiple days.

## Conventions

- Filename: `YYYY-MM-DD-<slug>.md` for dated artifacts.
- Sign every entry with `— <AgentName>`.
- When an artifact is promoted to canonical docs, leave a stub here with a redirect link.
